reviews.review_msg: She is my favorite prof in my entire four years of uni! She explains concepts so clearly and makes exams very straightforward! I definitely recommend a class with her. Shes amazing

Dr. Sneddon is a wonderful person, her lectures are clear and well-organized and she's always willing to stop and re-explain concepts when someone asks a question. Some of the content in 342 can be tricky without a background in CMPT, but she makes sure that everyone understands before moving on. I would definitely take more classes with her!

Lectures are extremely dry, does not put any effort into making the material interesting at all and basically killed any interest I had in bioinformatics. Talks in one tone for the entire two hours of lecture. Labs are easy but do not enforce lecture material very well.

Nice guy. Doesn't put an effort into making the material more meaningful, he used someone elses slides. Labs were ok, got to leave early once you finished, labs didn't reinforce all the material. Fell asleep every class. You'll need lots of coffee! LOL cuz shiz hellz boring! The class would be better if there were two midterms instead of a final.
need an upper division MBB course with no stress? take 342 with jack. nuff said
super nice prof, very kind and respectful and cares about everyone. she tells you what to focus on for the exams, so studying is a lot easier

Didnt wanna take 342 due to past reviews, but I think Dr Brinkman has changed the course since the last time she taught it to make it more digestible. That being said, she is a passionate, proactive, and caring prof whose exams are very fair. She does optional quizzes in class to supplement learning, and even brought snacks for the class every week

Fiona's such a kind and helpful person.I was on the fence about taking the class initially but I'm so glad I went ahead and did. She makes sure everyone understands the concepts and is pretty clear about what will be on the exams. The lecture content is a bit dry but that's out of her control. The TA was also super helpful and accommodating.

Its not her, it the course materials that boring. She's actually pretty nice and helps clarifying. The TA was nice too and helpful and the assignments for labs were straightforward. Just need to review and understand and be on top of the materials.

Dr. Brinkman is really caring and easy to approach. Every week, she would bring snacks ( some that she baked herself that were allergy-friendly) just in case anyone was hungry. As a lecturer, she does a good job explaining difficult material and highlighting what is important information. Overall, I would take any class with her again.

Professor Brinkman is the nice lady who tries to go through main points. I can see her trying to do better. But, the lecture materials are too content heavy with 76 pages in 1.5hours lecture. I would recommend her to emphasize things are critical rather than dumping too much slides. Hope she slows down since she goes way too fast.

Dr. Brinkman is one of the best profs I've had in MBB. She's very approachable and you can tell she tries her best to ensure the students are doing ok in her class. Her exams are not that hard as long as you reviewed bc everything is on the slide. The lab has step by step instructions that's pretty clear. Lab assignment is also not heavy load

Dr. Brinkman is really a nice and caring person but not good at teaching MBB 342. Perhaps the course is really boring and it is hard for students to memorize all the materials without really experiencing those techniques mentioned.
She seems nice enough but this course is so boring that it is making me rethink my major. Lab assignments are weighted very heavily with minimal guidance from the TA.
Mean, pretentious and unaccommodating. She will refuse to provide a logical reason for an arbitrary decision. If possible, I would pass on her courses.

She is really boring, but the course was also really boring. The grading is really weird because 40% of the grade comes from 56 marks worth of assignments. Of course the TA will not help much if at all. If this was an online course at least the teacher would not make relatively dry material more exhausting to understand. Very distracted in class.

Class was pretty easy, final exam was straightforward, she gives lots of hints over the semester. She cares about students and wants to make material relevant, but sometimes she blitzes over material too fast. Audio notes help. Take assignments seriously cause they're a big part of your grade. Nice lady.

As a whole, I think she is a good prof, and 342 was fairly easy. However, holy slides batman! She throws in like 75+ slides in a 1.5hr lecture, I think the important material could probably be communicated in half that. The course gives a good intro to bioinformatics, but really only scratches the surface.
